en: Immediate. Right there.
There's a real tear.
Ronda, together, we'll rally through this one.
Oh, God, dude.
Oh, my goodness, dude. Tough one.
It's a lot.
That's okay, though, because it's not okay.
I literally didn't even hear your question.
It is so hot.
Oh, my God.
What is happening to me?
ko: 나에게 무슨 일이 일어나고 있는 거지?

en: Right now, it's just me and you, mother fucker.
There's nothing else I see.
I'm, like, fucking blacked out.
It's that part of the trip, you know? Yes, exactly. Truly.
ko: 여행의 그 부분이야, 알지? 맞아, 정말로.

en: This is the part where you're like, okay, okay, I'm in this now.
ko: 이게 바로 네가 이렇게 생각하는 부분이야, 알겠어, 알겠어, 이제 나도 이 상황에 있어.

en: How you feeling?
Gotta be honest with you, pal.
I've been bad.
You know, people at home are all like, oh, you can't send it to celebrity sauces.
ko: 집에 있는 사람들은 모두 이렇게 말해. 오, 너는 유명인 소스에 보낼 수 없어.

en: They won't sauce the wings right.
ko: 그들은 날개를 제대로 소스하지 않을 거야.

en: What I've noticed, though, is everybody's just dumping the sauce on their wings.
ko: 그런데 내가 알아차린 건, 모두가 그냥 날개에 소스를 쏟고 있다는 거야.

en: Gotta get a good dab on there.
Don't be a fucking...
